news.t: Westwood Announces Monthly Income Distributions for Westwood Salient Enhanced Midstream Income ETF (MDST),Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI) and Westwood Enhanced Income Opportunity (YLDW)
Westwood Enhanced Income Series™ ETF Platform Surpasses $250 Million in Assets
Westwood Announces Monthly Income Distributions for Westwood Salient Enhanced Midstream Income ETF (MDST) and Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF (WEEI)
These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'

holdings.infoBox: MDST is an equity ETF with a total of 139 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 9.15%, Energy Transfer LP at 8.66%, The Williams Companies at 8.31%, Enterprise Products Partners at 6.75%, and DT Midstream at 6.31%.

overview.description: The Westwood Salient Enhanced Midstream Income ETF (MDST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in midstream North American companies and US master limited partnerships (MLPs). In addition, the fund enhances income through covered call options. MDST was launched on Apr 9, 2024 and is issued by Westwood.

data.title: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'
data.text: This week's ETF Wrap takes you inside the rally in dividend-paying equity ETFs as investors seek to position for President-elect Donald Trump's second term in the White House.
